reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the five current claims covered by the consumer onboarding smoke, durable packet/status checks, and bounded improvement tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet-visible candidate-not-proof status, which is directly covered by the current status summary packet and status report renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the current status-summary packet and renderer tests: `nonVerdictNotice` states that discovered claims are not verified until evidence is attached, and evidence-state/status report projections preserve open proof work.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the candidate-not-proof notice and evidence-state projection checks current when status packet shape changes.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names standalone consumer onboarding through install, adapter init, doctor readiness, and a first bounded run without claiming ownership of host policy.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by `npm run consumer:onboard:smoke -- --json` and the external smoke test: a temporary consumer repo installs the Cautilus Agent, initializes adapter wiring, reaches doctor ready, and completes one fixture-backed bounded eval run while runner proof readiness remains explicitly bounded.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the external consumer smoke aligned with install, adapter init, doctor readiness, and first bounded run behavior.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names representative durable command packet surfaces another agent can reopen.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused app tests and current status/evidence-state packets showing schema-versioned command, claim status, validation, eval-plan, and evidence-state outputs with repo-relative audit sources.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep durable packet tests current when adding or changing core command packet schemas.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names improvement evidence provenance, which is protected by deterministic improve proposal tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by Go and Node improve-flow tests: prioritized evidence entries carry packet and locator provenance, source-count telemetry records selected evidence categories, and review can trace proposals back to explicit inputs.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep improve proposal provenance and telemetry checks aligned with `cautilus.improve_proposal.v1` changes.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the bounded improvement loop boundary: one next-revision brief and one durable artifact, not an open-ended compile loop.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by app and Node improve tests: prepare-input produces explicit evidence inputs, propose emits one bounded revision plan with guardrail wording, and build-artifact materializes one revision artifact packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep improve prepare/propose/build-artifact tests aligned with bounded-loop wording in the improvement contract.
